Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Beth Huber, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Janice Anderson-Santos
Larry Hecimovich, Deputy City Attorney, for defendant and opposing party: City and County of San Francisco

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Janice Anderson-Santos' motion to compel responses to request for production of documents and form and special interrogatories is denied. The court finds that plaintiff failed to make a reasonable and good faith effort to informally resolve the matters in dispute before filing the instant motion. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
